vulnerability.title: Implement STIG Sub Crypto Policy
vulnerability.description: Create a custom cryptographic policy to follow the guidance from DISA.
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: cat << 'EOF' > /etc/crypto-policies/policies/modules/STIG.pmod cipher@SSH=AES-256-GCM AES-256-CTR AES-128-GCM AES-128-CTR mac@SSH=HMAC-SHA2-512 HMAC-SHA2-256 EOF sudo update-crypto-policies --set FIPS:STIG

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only creates a custom crypto policy file and runs update-crypto-policies, which does not modify bootloader, partitions, or kernel parameters. The selected SSH ciphers are standard and widely supported, minimizing risk of lockout. No reboot is required.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; Potential SSH compatibility issues if client does not support selected ciphers; Affected services may need restart to apply new crypto policy
